brand.name: Roly Home Services
visual_principles: Believable homes in the Tucker and Atlanta area
Warm natural light and clean professional job sites
Protected furniture, precise prep, and finished surfaces
Trust-building homeowner, realtor, and contractor moments
No fake company names, readable labels, or generated logos inside images

negative_prompt_global: no readable text, no fake logos, no brand names, no distorted hands, no unsafe ladders, no messy jobsite, no over-saturated HDR, no cartoon look, no luxury mansion, no stock-photo posing

hero_wide.usage: Top-of-page hero panes and wide conversion backgrounds

card.usage: Service cards, gallery cards, and case-study previews

square_detail.usage: Technical details and legacy square slots only

story_process.usage: Scrollytelling, VSL stills, and process backgrounds

social_vertical.usage: Story ads, reels, and vertical VSL cuts

subtle_texture.usage: Soft CTA and form-section backgrounds where a full photo would distract

current_asset_audit.issue: Overused as hero, exterior card, presale hero, services hero, painting hero, and gallery exterior image.
Repeated across cards, gallery, process story, and VSL background.
Contains generated-looking badges/text and a generic handshake composition.
Contains a fake shirt logo that weakens brand trust.
Contains readable product branding and should be replaced for premium brand polish.
Contains readable mural text; future community images should use abstract shapes or real approved signage.

priority_slots.alt: Freshly painted Atlanta craftsman home by Roly Home Services
priority_slots.prompt: Photorealistic wide 16:9 exterior of a freshly painted Atlanta craftsman home, deep navy siding, cream trim, warm orange front door, clean landscaping, morning light, premium but believable neighborhood, space for website copy, no text, no logos.
alternatives: Professional painter respectfully walking a homeowner through an exterior finish inspection on a clean front porch, Atlanta craftsman home, color swatches and clipboard, warm trust-building documentary photography, no visible brand text.
Wide editorial photo of a clean Atlanta family home after exterior painting, protected porch furniture restored in place, crisp trim, warm morning shadows, premium local service realism, no text.

alternatives: Wide photo of a professional painting crew preparing an Atlanta home interior, labeled-free tools arranged neatly, floors fully covered, homeowner observing confidently from a safe distance, warm natural light.
Premium local home service scene showing paint samples, protected furniture, drywall touch-up tools, and a clean project checklist on a kitchen island, no readable text.
